req.title: Create observation
req.statement: A clinician shall create an Observation tied to a patient with LOINC-coded code element; Observations without code shall be rejected.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for Observation creation requirements:
- A clinician shall create an Observation tied to a patient with LOINC-coded code element
- Observations without code shall be rejected
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from datetime import datetime, timezone


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain / service stubs – replace these imports with your actual modules
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# from your_module import ObservationService, Observation, Patient, Clinician
# from your_module.exceptions import (
#     MissingCodeError, InvalidCodeSystemError, MissingPatientError
# )

# ── Minimal in-process stubs so the tests are runnable without a live backend ──

LOINC_SYSTEM = "http://loinc.org"


class MissingCodeError(ValueError):
    """Raised when an Observation has no code element."""


class InvalidCodeSystemError(ValueError):
    """Raised when the code system is not LOINC."""


class MissingPatientError(ValueError):
    """Raised when an Observation has no patient reference."""


class Observation:
    def __init__(
        self,
        *,
        patient_id: str | None,
        code_system: str | None,
        code_value: str | None,
        code_display: str | None = None,
        status: str = "final",
        value: float | None = None,
        value_unit: str | None = None,
        effective_datetime: datetime | None = None,
    ):
        self.patient_id = patient_id
        self.code_system = code_system
        self.code_value = code_value
        self.code_display = code_display
        self.status = status
        self.value = value
        self.value_unit = value_unit
        self.effective_datetime = effective_datetime or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.id: str | None = None  # assigned after persistence


class ObservationService:
    """Thin service layer that validates and persists Observations."""

    def __init__(self, repository):
        self._repo = repository

    def create(self, clinician_id: str, observation: Observation) -> Observation:
        # Validate patient reference
        if not observation.patient_id:
            raise MissingPatientError("Observation must reference a patient.")

        # Validate code presence
        if not observation.code_value or not observation.code_system:
            raise MissingCodeError(
                "Observation must contain a code element with system and value."
            )

        # Validate LOINC system
        if observation.code_system != LOINC_SYSTEM:
            raise InvalidCodeSystemError(
                f"Code system must be '{LOINC_SYSTEM}', got '{observation.code_system}'."
            )

        # Persist
        return self._repo.save(clinician_id=clinician_id, observation=observation)


# ── Fixtures ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


@pytest.fixture()
def mock_repository():
    """A mock repository that auto-assigns an ID on save."""
    repo = MagicMock()

    def _save(clinician_id, observation):
        observation.id = "obs-001"
        return observation

    repo.save.side_effect = _save
    return repo


@pytest.fixture()
def service(mock_repository):
    return ObservationService(repository=mock_repository)


@pytest.fixture()
def clinician_id():
    return "clinician-42"


@pytest.fixture()
def patient_id():
    return "patient-99"


@pytest.fixture()
def valid_loinc_observation(patient_id):
    """A fully valid Observation with a LOINC code."""
    return Observation(
        patient_id=patient_id,
        code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
        code_value="8480-6",          # LOINC: Systolic blood pressure
        code_display="Systolic blood pressure",
        status="final",
        value=120.0,
        value_unit="mmHg",
    )


# ── Tests: successful creation ───────────────────────────────────────────────


class TestCreateObservationSuccess:

    def test_create_returns_observation_with_assigned_id(
        self, service, clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation
    ):
        """Saved observation receives a server-assigned identifier."""
        result = service.create(clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation)
        assert result.id is not None

    def test_create_preserves_patient_reference(
        self, service, clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation, patient_id
    ):
        """The patient reference on the stored observation matches the input."""
        result = service.create(clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation)
        assert result.patient_id == patient_id

    def test_create_preserves_loinc_code_system(
        self, service, clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation
    ):
        """The LOINC system URL is retained after persistence."""
        result = service.create(clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation)
        assert result.code_system == LOINC_SYSTEM

    def test_create_preserves_loinc_code_value(
        self, service, clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation
    ):
        """The LOINC code value is retained after persistence."""
        result = service.create(clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation)
        assert result.code_value == "8480-6"

    def test_create_calls_repository_save_once(
        self, service, clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation, mock_repository
    ):
        """The repository save method is invoked exactly once."""
        service.create(clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation)
        mock_repository.save.assert_called_once()

    def test_create_passes_clinician_id_to_repository(
        self, service, clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation, mock_repository
    ):
        """The clinician identifier is forwarded to the repository."""
        service.create(clinician_id, valid_loinc_observation)
        _, kwargs = mock_repository.save.call_args
        assert kwargs.get("clinician_id") == clinician_id

    def test_create_with_different_valid_loinc_codes(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Multiple distinct LOINC codes are all accepted."""
        loinc_codes = [
            ("8480-6", "Systolic blood pressure"),
            ("8867-4", "Heart rate"),
            ("2093-3", "Cholesterol [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma"),
            ("718-7",  "Hemoglobin [Mass/volume] in Blood"),
        ]
        for code_value, code_display in loinc_codes:
            obs = Observation(
                patient_id=patient_id,
                code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
                code_value=code_value,
                code_display=code_display,
            )
            result = service.create(clinician_id, obs)
            assert result.code_value == code_value, (
                f"Expected code_value={code_value!r} to be accepted"
            )

    def test_create_observation_status_is_preserved(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Observation status value is preserved through the service layer."""
        for status in ("final", "preliminary", "amended"):
            obs = Observation(
                patient_id=patient_id,
                code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
                code_value="8480-6",
                status=status,
            )
            result = service.create(clinician_id, obs)
            assert result.status == status


# ── Tests: rejection when code element is missing ────────────────────────────


class TestCreateObservationRejectedMissingCode:

    def test_raises_when_code_value_is_none(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Observation with code_value=None must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
            code_value=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_raises_when_code_value_is_empty_string(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Observation with an empty code_value string must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
            code_value="",
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_raises_when_code_system_is_none(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Observation with code_system=None must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=None,
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_raises_when_code_system_is_empty_string(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Observation with an empty code_system string must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system="",
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_raises_when_both_code_system_and_value_are_none(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Observation missing both code fields must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=None,
            code_value=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_repository_not_called_when_code_is_missing(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id, mock_repository
    ):
        """Repository must NOT be invoked when code validation fails."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=None,
            code_value=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)
        mock_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_missing_code_error_message_is_informative(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """The MissingCodeError message must mention 'code'."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=None,
            code_value=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError, match=r"(?i)code"):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)


# ── Tests: rejection when code system is not LOINC ───────────────────────────


class TestCreateObservationRejectedInvalidCodeSystem:

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("bad_system", [
        "http://snomed.info/sct",
        "http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm",
        "http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10",
        "urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.6.1",   # LOINC OID – not the canonical URL
        "LOINC",                             # informal name, not the system URL
        "http://loinc.org/v3",               # almost-correct URL variant
    ])
    def test_raises_for_non_loinc_code_system(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id, bad_system
    ):
        """Any code system other than the canonical LOINC URL must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system=bad_system,
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(InvalidCodeSystemError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_invalid_code_system_error_message_names_loinc(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Error message must reference the expected LOINC system URL."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system="http://snomed.info/sct",
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(InvalidCodeSystemError, match=LOINC_SYSTEM):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_repository_not_called_for_invalid_code_system(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id, mock_repository
    ):
        """Repository must NOT be invoked when the code system is invalid."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system="http://snomed.info/sct",
            code_value="271649006",
        )
        with pytest.raises(InvalidCodeSystemError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)
        mock_repository.save.assert_not_called()


# ── Tests: rejection when patient reference is missing ───────────────────────


class TestCreateObservationRejectedMissingPatient:

    def test_raises_when_patient_id_is_none(
        self, service, clinician_id
    ):
        """Observation without a patient reference must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=None,
            code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingPatientError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_raises_when_patient_id_is_empty_string(
        self, service, clinician_id
    ):
        """Observation with an empty patient ID must be rejected."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id="",
            code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingPatientError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_repository_not_called_when_patient_is_missing(
        self, service, clinician_id, mock_repository
    ):
        """Repository must NOT be invoked when patient reference is absent."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=None,
            code_system=LOINC_SYSTEM,
            code_value="8480-6",
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingPatientError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)
        mock_repository.save.assert_not_called()


# ── Tests: validation precedence ─────────────────────────────────────────────


class TestValidationPrecedence:

    def test_missing_patient_raises_before_missing_code(
        self, service, clinician_id
    ):
        """Patient validation runs before code validation."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=None,
            code_system=None,
            code_value=None,
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingPatientError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)

    def test_missing_code_raises_before_invalid_system(
        self, service, clinician_id, patient_id
    ):
        """Code-presence check runs before code-system check."""
        obs = Observation(
            patient_id=patient_id,
            code_system="http://snomed.info/sct",
            code_value=None,           # missing value triggers MissingCodeError first
        )
        with pytest.raises(MissingCodeError):
            service.create(clinician_id, obs)
```

---

## What the test suite covers

| # | Test class | Scenario |
|---|-----------|----------|
| 1 | `TestCreateObservationSuccess` | Happy-path: LOINC-coded observation tied to a patient is accepted, persisted, and all fields are preserved |
| 2 | `TestCreateObservationRejectedMissingCode` | `MissingCodeError` raised for `None`, empty `code_value`, `None` / empty `code_system`, or both missing; repository is never called |
| 3 | `TestCreateObservationRejectedInvalidCodeSystem` | `InvalidCodeSystemError` raised for SNOMED, RxNorm, ICD-10, LOINC OID, informal names, and near-miss URLs; error message names the expected URL |
| 4 | `TestCreateObservationRejectedMissingPatient` | `MissingPatientError` raised for `None` or empty patient reference; repository is never called |
| 5 | `TestValidationPrecedence` | Patient check fires before code check; code-presence check fires before code-system check |

"""
Pytest tests for Observation creation requirements:
- A clinician shall create an Observation tied to a patient with LOINC-coded code element
- Observations without code shall be rejected
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from datetime import datetime, timezone


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain / service stubs – replace these imports with your actual modules
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# from your_module import ObservationService, Observation, Patient, Clinician
# from your_module.exceptions import (
#     MissingCodeError, InvalidCodeSystemError, MissingPatientError
# )

# ── Minimal in-process stubs so the tests are runnable without a live backend ──

LOINC_SYSTEM = "http://loinc.org"


class MissingCodeError(ValueError):
    """Raised when an Observation has no code element."""


class InvalidCodeSystemError(ValueError):
    """Raised when the code system is not LOINC."""


class MissingPatientError(ValueError):
    """Raised when an Observation has no patient reference."""


class Observation:
    def __init__(
        self,
        *,
        patient_id: str | None,
        code_system: str | None,
        code_value: str | None,
        code_display: str | None = None,
        status: str = "final",
        value: float | None = None,
        value_unit: str | None = None,
        effective_datetime: datetime | None = None,
    ):
        self.patient_id = patient_id
        self.code_system = code_system
        self.code_value = code_value
        self.code_display = code_display
        self.status = status
        self.value = value
        self.value_unit = value_unit
        self.effective_datetime = effective_datetime or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        self.id: str | None = None  # assigned after persistence

    """Thin service layer that validates and persists Observations."""
